raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint regarding XXXX unauthorized XXXX at XXXX XXXXXXXX, MO, XXXX on my American Express credit card that American Express refused to reverse after disputes. 

On XX/XX/year>, my card was charged {$170.00} at an XXXX pay-at-the-pump location. On XX/XX/year>, a second charge of {$170.00} appeared from the same merchant. I did not authorize either transaction. 

My vehicles do not have fuel tanks capable of accepting fuel purchases anywhere near these amounts. Under normal use, my fuel purchases do not exceed approximately {$60.00}. These charges are therefore physically impossible for my vehicles and strongly indicate fraud, pump manipulation, or card compromise. In addition charges were at another State, City different to my home location in XXXX, Fl, XXXX I promptly reported both transactions to American Express and opened disputes. Despite providing documentation and explaining the physical impossibility of these charges, American Express closed both disputes and determined that I am responsible for the charges without providing sufficient evidence or explanation other than XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Credit Card records. 

I am requesting that American Express conduct a proper fraud review, reverse the unauthorized charges, and provide a clear explanation of how liability was determined.
